sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps (event_time TIMESTAMP, description VARCHAR);

INSERT INTO timestamps (event_time, description) VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 12:00:00', 'New Year Event'), (TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 13:15:00', 'Lunch Break Event'), (TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 14:30:00', NULL);
SELECT extract('hour' FROM event_time) AS event_hour, description FROM timestamps WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT extract('hour' FROM event_time) - INTERVAL '2 HOUR' AS adjusted_hour FROM timestamps;
CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP, event_type VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO events (event_id, event_time, event_type) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 12:00:00', 'Holiday'), (2, NULL, 'Birthday'), (3, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 13:00:00', 'Meeting');
SELECT e.event_id, extract('hour' FROM e.event_time) - INTERVAL '1 HOUR' AS adjusted_event_hour FROM events e WHERE e.event_type = 'Meeting' OR e.event_time IS NULL;

SELECT e1.event_id, e1.event_time, (SELECT extract('hour' FROM e2.event_time) FROM events e2 WHERE e2.event_id = e1.event_id) - INTERVAL '1 HOUR' AS subtracted_hour FROM events e1 WHERE e1.event_time IS NOT NULL;

SELECT e.event_id, (extract('hour' FROM e.event_time) * 60) / 60 AS hours, extract('hour' FROM e.event_time) - INTERVAL (SELECT MAX(extract('hour' FROM e2.event_time)) FROM events e2) HOUR AS diff_hour FROM events e GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_time HAVING hours >= 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL AND event_time <= TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 14:00:00' - INTERVAL '1 HOUR';
SELECT event_time, extract('hour' FROM event_time) - INTERVAL (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM timestamps) HOUR AS hour_offset FROM timestamps WHERE description IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_events AS SELECT extract('hour' FROM event_time) AS hours FROM events WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
